order: SHARED.md sec 7 -- contract parses 32-byte big-endian Fr in this exact order

public_inputs.name: merkle_root
public_inputs.description: Root the (real) input notes belong to; contract checks it is in the root history.

public_inputs.name: nullifier_1
public_inputs.description: Nullifier of input note 1 (here a dummy/phantom note, amount 0).

public_inputs.name: out_commitment_1
public_inputs.description: Change output note back to the sender (amount 300).
